articles.title: Virat Kohli's Playoffs Record A Worry As RCB Take On GT In Hunt For IPL 2026 Final
articles.description: Virat Kohli has scored 396 runs at an average of 26.40 and a strike rate of 121.10 in 17 playoff matches.

articles.title: SAFF Championship: India women score one shy of a dozen
articles.description: India dominated Maldives with an 11-0 victory in their SAFF Women's Championship opener. Despite the resounding scoreline, coach Crispin Chettri expressed dissatisfaction with the team's second-half performance, emphasizing the need to convert chances more effectively. Aveka Singh shone with four goals, while Priyangka Devi Naorem and Karishma Shirvoikar also contributed significantly to the dominant win.

articles.title: Arshdeep Singh wipes social profiles following IPL setback, viral Kohli reel also missing
articles.description: Punjab Kings pacer Arshdeep Singh has appeared to clean out a significant portion of his social media content from Instagram amid critique over his performance and online activity.

articles.title: 'Virat Kohli has done more than anyone else': Shubman Gill’s adaptability put next to RCB star's greatness
articles.description: Vijay Dahiya drew a detailed comparison between Kohli and Shubman, focusing on their ability to adapt across situations and formats.

articles.title: Delhi Gymkhana Club row: Centre tells HC no forcible takeover before June 5, alternate accommodation possible
articles.description: The Centre has assured the Delhi High Court that the Delhi Gymkhana Club premises will not be forcibly taken over before June 5. The government stated that the club has been given the option to vacate voluntarily. Alternate accommodation may also be provided as part of the lease determination process. The court heard pleas related to the club dispute.

articles.title: Arshdeep Singh's Instagram detox: Changes DP, deletes 200+ Instagram posts; Viral Virat Kohli reel also removed
articles.description: India pacer Arshdeep Singh has sparked speculation after deleting over 200 Instagram posts and changing his display picture, reducing his profile to just 40 posts. The social media cleanup also saw the removal of his viral reel with Virat Kohli, which had garnered millions of views online.

articles.title: Norway Chess’ confessional booth has a new star: Divya Deshmukh
articles.description: Players like Magnus Carlsen and Hikaru Nakamura love the confessional booth. The Indian players, on the other hand, have traditionally wanted to be nowhere near it. That seems likely to change with Divya Deshmukh this year.

articles.title: Divya Deshmukh Stuns Women's World Champion Ju Wenjun In Dream Start At Norway Chess
articles.description: Divya Deshmukh made headlines at the Norway Chess tournament by defeating reigning women's world champion Ju Wenjun.

articles.title: IPL Qualifier 1: Virat Kohli vs Shubman Gill set to hold key
articles.description: The spotlight is firmly on Virat Kohli and Shubman Gill as the IPL 2026 playoffs begin in Dharamsala. With Qualifier 1 carrying massive stakes, both batting superstars could prove decisive for their sides in a high-pressure clash.

articles.title: Conor McGregor contract update: The Notorious drops big news ahead of his highly anticipated UFC return
articles.description: Conor McGregor has confirmed he is satisfied with the UFC contract terms that paved the way for his long-awaited return at UFC 329 against Max Holloway. The former two-division champion revealed he finally feels “honored” by the promotion after complicated negotiations tied to the UFC’s new media rights era. Reports suggest McGregor still has only two fights remaining on his current deal, potentially setting up a major free-agency situation in combat sports. Alongside the contract news, McGregor also shared insight into his mindset entering the comeback.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chicago Bears and Dallas Cowboys emerge as potential landing spots for $76.4 million Arizona Cardinals star
articles.description: Fresh NFL trade rumors surrounding Arizona Cardinals pass-rusher Josh Sweat are beginning to gain momentum after the veteran skipped voluntary OTAs. With reports suggesting Sweat is unhappy in Arizona, teams like the Chicago Bears and Dallas Cowboys have emerged as possible landing spots. Here’s what insiders are saying about the speculation, Sweat’s $76.4 million contract, salary cap implications, and why multiple contenders could monitor the situation closely heading into the 2026 NFL season.

articles.title: World Cup 2026: Mexico President welcomes Iran National team Base Camp to Tijuana, says ‘no problem’
articles.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum confirmed Tijuana will host Iran's football base camp for the 2026 World Cup after U.S. authorities refused to allow the squad to stay overnight.

articles.title: No place for Virat Kohli as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi gets the nod in former CSK star's best IPL 2026 playing XII
articles.description: Former India batter Subramaniam Badrinath picked his IPL 2026 league-stage best XII, leaving out Virat Kohli and KL Rahul. He chose Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Shubman Gill as openers, with Sai Sudharsan, Heinrich Klaasen, and Rajat Patidar in the batting lineup. His bowling-heavy squad included Krunal Pandya, Sunil Narine, Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Jofra Archer, and Kagiso Rabada.

articles.description: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru face Gujarat Titans in IPL 2026 Qualifier 1. Both teams, finishing with equal points, boast strong batting and bowling units. GT assistant coach Vijay Dahiya highlighted the importance of bowlers and key players like Kohli, Gill, and Sudharsan in this high-stakes encounter.

articles.title: Spain 2026 World Cup final squad revealed: Yamal leads 26-man list with no Real Madrid players included
articles.description: Spain head to the 2026 FIFA World Cup after UEFA Euro 2024 glory, with Lamine Yamal leading a 26-man squad announced by Luis de la Fuente. Notably, no Real Madrid players feature for the first time in World Cup history. Despite fitness doubts, Spain’s young core and experienced spine aim to extend their dominance into the global stage.

articles.title: Will Arsenal Make Champions League History? Mikel Arteta Sends Message After EPL Triumph
articles.description: Arsenal are Premier League champions. But for Mikel Arteta... the story isn’t finished yet. After years of heartbreak, near-misses, pressure and criticism, Arteta finally delivered the league title back to North London. And now, with the Premier League trophy secured, Arsenal stand on the edge of something even bigger — the UEFA Champions League final in Budapest. Can Arsenal complete the dream season and conquer Europe? Can Arteta lead this young side to immortality? In this video: 00:00 – Mikel Arteta Sends Emotional Message After Arsenal’s EPL Triumph 01:21 – Arsenal Dream of Historic Champions League Glory in Budapest 02:45 – Can the Gunners Conquer Europe & Complete the Perfect Season?
